creator: gamer@ryppn.com
text:
Been digging into this more, seems the project is https://launchpad.net/postfix-policyd-spf-perl/

2.010 is very old now, circa 2012 and there is a newer version available, namely 2.011 from 2018.

Have downloaded and extracted the perl file and ran a diff on 2.010, there are a few changes, so to test I edited  the shebang to be freebsd specific and replaced the postfix-policyd-spf-perl file in /usr/local/libexec

No issues to report and haven't seen the error again since I replaced the file. Will monitor for a day or so before reaching out to the package maintainer.
